dialogue_text: Oh! the Duchess, the Duchess! Oh! won't she be savage if I've kept her waiting!
source_excerpt: After a time she heard a little pattering of feet in the distance, and she hastily dried her eyes to see what was coming. It was the White Rabbit returning, splendidly dressed, with a pair of white kid gloves in one hand and a large fan...
